pdf_extraction_process: Automatically scan all local PDF sources and extract photonic-material optical-sensing performance records with source-specific text rules.

automatic_extraction.rule_type: source-specific regular-expression rules over normalized PDF text
automatic_extraction.all_pdf_policy: Every PDF listed in source_map.json with a local raw_file is opened and scanned. PDFs without an extraction rule, such as review articles, are logged as skipped rather than silently ignored.
automatic_extraction.manual_data_entry: No final records are stored in this manifest. The CSV is generated from PDF text at runtime by scripts/extract_pdf.py.

normalization_steps: replace common ligatures with ASCII equivalents
normalize dash/minus variants before scientific-notation parsing
normalize multiplication signs before parsing values such as 1.9 x 10 5

automatic_rules.notes: The source is theoretical; extracted records are marked as theoretical in notes.

skipped_pdf_policy.review_articles: Review PDFs are opened and logged, but direct records are not extracted because Practice 2 defines them as snowballing and terminology sources.
skipped_pdf_policy.unmapped_or_no_rule: PDFs without an automatic rule remain in the extraction log with status=skipped and records=0.
